name: Yudhishthira
description_short: The eldest Pandava and rightful heir to Hastinapura, embodiment of dharma and righteousness.
description_long: Yudhishthira, the firstborn of the Pandavas, was born to Kunti and the god of death, Dharma (Yama). His unwavering commitment to truth and righteous conduct earned him the title Dharmaraja. Though a skilled warrior, his true strength lay in strategy, diplomacy, and moral authority. His adherence to dharma was both his greatest virtue and, at times, a source of conflict with his more pragmatic brothers.
notable_events: Ascended to heaven in mortal form
